content.full_text:
November 19, 2003

Michael D. Milich, City Attorney
City of Modesto
Office of the City Attorney
Post Office Box 642
Modesto, CA 95353

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-229

Dear Mr. Milich:

This letter is in response to your request on behalf of Mayor Carmen Sabatino for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Pursuant to the request of Mayor Sabatino, conveyed in a telephone conversation on November 17, 2003, we are withdrawing the request for advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

HBA:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\W-03-229

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
